DISCOVERY 301, PLAINTIFF AT&T ADVERTISING, L.P.'S MOTION FOR ORDER COMPELLING ANSWERS TO WRITTEN INTERROGATORIES AND FOR SANCTIONS IS GRANTED, NO OPPOSITION WAS FILED. DEFENDANT ORDERED TO ANSWER PLAINTIFF'S FIRST SET OF INTERROGATORIES NO LATER THAN FEBRUARY 25, 2011. THR COURT AWARDED SANCTIONS IN THE AMOUNT OF $590.00. MOVING PARTY IS TO SUBMIT A PROPOSED FORM OF ORDER. JUDGE: PETER J. BUSCH, NOT REPORTED.

Notice And Motion For Order Compelling Answers To Written Interrogatories And Sanctions
Off Calendar Feb-15-2011 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

NO APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS:
PLAINTIFF AT&T ADVERTISING, L.P.'S Motion For Order Compelling Answers To Written Interrogatories And for Sanctions is Granted, no opposition was filed. Defendant ordered to answer plaintiff's first set of interrogatories no later than February 25, 2011. Thr court awarded sanctions in the amount of $590.00. Moving party is to submit a proposed form of order. Judge: Peter J. Busch, Not reported. = (301/PJB)
